name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_NEW_TARGETPAIRS_3Y
description: Top assignees by new target pairs last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p0:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y0:Year)
WITH tp, min(y0.year) AS first_year, max_year
WHERE first_year >= max_year - $years + 1
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS emerging_targetpair_count
ORDER BY emerging_targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies have filed the largest number of patents covering novel target-pair combinations over the last three years?
Over the last three years, which assignees have been most active in patent filings for newly emerging target-pair combinations?
In the past three years, which companies lead by patent count for novel BsAb target-pair combinations?
